description_long: This object is a classic AK-47 style assault rifle, featuring a combination of dark metal and wood components. The stock and handguard are made of polished wood, giving it a traditional and robust appearance. The receiver, barrel, and magazine are constructed from matte black metal, with the magazine being curved and detachable. The rifle is equipped with standard iron sights, including a front post and a rear notch. The muzzle end is fitted with a simple slant compensator, typical of this rifle type. The overall design is utilitarian, with visible screws, levers, and a trigger guard, reflecting its function as a reliable firearm.
description: A classic AK-47 style rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, black metal receiver, and a curved detachable magazine. It features iron sights and a slant compensator at the muzzle.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and full length of the barrel with iron sights.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow profile, front sight post, and muzzle device.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and receiver details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and sights.
